claimBoundary: This A/B identifies the velocity sampling mechanism only. It does not authorize a production operator change, fluid allocation, D20, experimental agreement, or relaxation of any prior gate.
nextAction: Correct the signed-distance link intersection location before changing wall velocity or running fluid.
scientificVerdict: The frozen link-velocity A/B is signed-distance-intersection-placement-bias. Production, the raw spatial rejection, and the D20 block remain unchanged.
